item.title: Version 0.2.13
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.13
- App icon is now solid black edge-to-edge — removed the grey border macOS was adding. - Org-chart cards are all the same height now, so the tree connector lines stay straight. Long job titles truncate to two lines; hover a card's title to see the full text. - When you search contacts, anyone already on the map now shows up greyed out ("Already on the map") instead of disappearing from the results.

item.title: Version 0.2.12
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.12
- Renamed the org-chart "Refresh" button to "Refresh Attio feed" so it's clear what it does. - It now also updates cards already on the chart — if a contact's name or title changed in Attio, the card on your map reflects it.

item.title: Version 0.2.11
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.11
- Org map auto-arrange now spaces rows by the actual height of each card, so tall multi-line cards no longer overlap the row below — clean top-down trees every time. - Added Redo (⇧⌘Z or ⌘Y) to go with Undo (⌘Z).

item.title: Version 0.2.10
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.10
- Tidier sidebar: API keys, Connections, Activity, and Updates are now grouped under a single "Settings" tab (with sub-tabs inside).

item.title: Version 0.2.9
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.9
- Right-click a card to add a manager, subordinate, or peer (search and pick the contact), or to replace the contact on a card. - Color-coded role labels (Decision maker, Champion, Evaluator, Procurement, Influencer, Detractor). Pick several and the colored bar splits to show each. - Undo with ⌘Z. - Cleaner cards: the connection dots now appear only when you hover a card.

item.title: Version 0.2.8
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.8
- Org chart: drawing a connection now produces clean, solid down-tree lines. Dragging from a card's bottom handle to another card makes it report to that manager; a manager with multiple subordinates lays out neatly below, no more stray dashed/diagonal lines.

item.title: Version 0.2.7
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.7
- Org chart: fixed connections disappearing after you drew them. You can now draw a line from a card's handle to another card and it stays — the higher card becomes the manager, side-by-side becomes a peer. A manager with multiple subordinates works, arranged neatly below. - Bigger, easier-to-grab cards and connection points; thicker lines.

item.title: Version 0.2.6
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.6
- Org chart: a manager can now have multiple subordinates — drop a card beside an existing report and it connects up to the same manager with a solid line, then auto-arranges neatly below. - Placeholder cards (editable name/title, not linked to CRM), per-account Refresh from Attio, Favorites & Recently viewed, owner filter. - Job titles wrap on cards; collapsible sidebar; refined app icon.

item.title: Version 0.2.2
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.2
- Accounts: searchable, sortable, paginated table with owner filter, deals count and total value - Account hub: link Notion notes, Granola transcripts, and Slack channels to each account - Org page: LinkedIn-style relationship map — add contacts, drag to snap into manager / reports-to / peer, with editable comments - In-app Updates tab with manual update checks - External links now open in your browser; org-chart exports download to Downloads
